title: Comparison of anthracycline plus platinum versus other platinum-based regimens as first-line chemotherapy for untreated thymoma: A retrospective cohort study (NEJ023B).
abstract: Optimal management of advanced thymoma remains uncertain. We compared the efficacy of first-line platinum-anthracycline chemotherapy with other platinum-based regimens in a large Japanese cohort.
trial_name: Phase II study of everolimus in thymoma and thymic carcinoma previously treated with cisplatin-based chemotherapy
